zh.Sherford, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文黑福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Latymer於1432年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親Sir John Latimer47歲，母親Catherine Pipar27歲。他和Joanna Hody至少有3個女兒。他去世於1505年4月17日在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.Sherford, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文黑福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Latymer于1432年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲Sir John Latimer47岁，母亲Catherine Pipar27岁。他和Joanna Hody至少有3个女儿。他去世于1505年4月17日在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Latymer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Latymer was born in 1432, in Dorset, England, his father, Sir John Latimer, was 47 and his mother, Catherine Pipar, was 27. He had at least 3 daughters with Joanna Hody. He died on 17 April 1505, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Latymer est né en 1432, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Latimer, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Catherine Pipar, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Joanna Hody. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1505, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Latymer 1432 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Latimer 47 und seine Mutter Catherine Pipar 27. Er hatte mit Joanna Hody mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. April 1505 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Latymer è nato il nel 1432 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Latimer, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Pipar, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Joanna Hody. Morì il 17 aprile 1505, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Latymerが1432年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Sir John Latimerは47歳，母Catherine Piparは27歳であった。彼はJoanna Hodyとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1505年4月17日に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Latymer(이)가 1432년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Latimer(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Pipar(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Joanna Hody(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 4월 17일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sherford, Devon, England: Sherford, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Latymer nasceu em 1432, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Latimer, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Pipar, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Joanna Hody. Ele faleceu em 17 de abril de 1505, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Latymer родился в 1432 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Latimer было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Pipar, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Joanna Hody. Он умер 17 апреля 1505 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Latymer nació en 1432, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Latimer, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Catherine Pipar, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Joanna Hody. Murió el 17 de abril de 1505, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
